data.name: I Touched Tips with a Femboy
data.detailed_description:
Male on Femboy

A boring hike with a femboy yields new experiences... 😜

You meet a special person on a church group hike. After he sprained his ankle, it's your shoulder he has to lean on, and his delicate hands leaves you feeling ways about stuff. After pitching the tent, Cody invites you inside for a friendly match of thumb war..

The rest is history... 😏

Read through an exciting story as well as some pretty raunchy(erotic) dialogue, accompanied by spicy nude depictions.

Gameplay

  • Kinetic Visual Novel

  • H-Scenes 

  •  ~4K words

Immerse yourself in the story by typing in your own name, then proceeding to read through a raunchy story from the first-person perspective.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz Pentium 4
  • 記憶體: 400 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
